description_long: This object is a round donut with a central hole, featuring a thick layer of glossy chocolate glaze on its upper surface. The donut is decorated with a white icing drizzle in a wavy pattern, adding visual contrast and texture. The sides are encased in a fluted, white paper baking cup with brownish stains and faint printed text, suggesting it was freshly baked or handled. The donut's surface appears slightly uneven, with visible chocolate and icing pooling in some areas. The overall appearance is appetizing and realistic, with a soft, cake-like texture implied beneath the glaze. The object is small and would fit comfortably in the palm of a hand, typical of a single-serving pastry.
description: A chocolate-glazed donut with white icing drizzle, presented in a fluted white paper baking cup with brown stains and printed text.
description_view_0: Front view shows the fluted white paper cup and the lower edge of the donut, with chocolate glaze visible on the upper rim.
description_view_1: Angled side view highlights the wavy white icing drizzle and the brown stains on the paper cup, with the donut's top surface partially visible.
description_view_2: Top-down view reveals the full chocolate glaze, white icing pattern, and the central hole, emphasizing the donut's decorative surface.
description_view_3: Opposite angled side view shows more of the paper cup's text and stains, with the donut's top and side details visible.
attribute_icing_type: Chocolate glaze with white sugar icing drizzle, glossy and slightly uneven.
attribute_packaging_style: Fluted white paper baking cup with brown stains and printed text.
attribute_placement_location: In a fluted paper baking cup, not shown on any surface or within additional packaging.
